name: Callout
visual_summary: A Callout is a visual indicator for highlighting important information. It typically contains a title, an icon (optional), and content. Developers would use a Callout when they need to draw attention to a particular piece of information on the screen.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: Callout
Description: A Callout is a visual indicator for highlighting important information. It typically contains a title, an icon (optional), and content. Developers would use a Callout when they need to draw attention to a particular piece of information on the screen.
Style: boxed, rounded
Interactions: clickable, readable
Tags: alert, notification, informational

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
